schema.name: CiscoUmbrellaCloudFirewall_CL
schema.description: Cloud firewall logs show traffic that has been handled by Secure Access cloud-delivered firewall.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The date and time of the cloud-delivered firewall traffic event, expressed as a UTC-formatted string.

columns.name: OriginIds
columns.description: The unique identity of the network tunnel.

columns.name: Identities
columns.description: The names of the network tunnel.

columns.name: IdentityType
columns.description: The type of identity that made the request. Should always be CDFW Tunnel Device.

columns.name: Direction
columns.description: The direction of the packet. It is destined either towards the internet or to the customer's network.

columns.name: Protocol
columns.description: The actual protocol of the traffic. Valid values are: TCP, UDP, or ICMP.

columns.name: PacketSize
columns.description: The size in bytes of the packet sent to the CDFW.

columns.name: SourceIp
columns.description: The internal IP address of the user-generated traffic towards the CDFW. If the traffic goes through NAT before it comes to CDFW, it will be the NAT IP address.

columns.name: SourcePort
columns.description: The internal port number of the user-generated traffic towards the CDFW.

columns.name: DestinationIp
columns.description: The destination IP address of the user-generated traffic towards the CDFW.

columns.name: DestinationPort
columns.description: The destination port number of the user-generated traffic towards the CDFW.

columns.name: DataCenter
columns.description: The name of the data center that processed the user-generated traffic.

columns.name: RuleId
columns.description: The ID of the rule that processed the user traffic.

columns.name: Action
columns.description: The final verdict whether to allow or block the traffic based on the rule.

columns.name: Fqdns
columns.description: The fully qualified domain names (FQDNs) that match the request.

columns.name: DestinationListIds
columns.description: The destination list IDs that Secure Access applied in the rule.

columns.name: FirstPacketTimestamp
columns.description: The timestamp when the first packet of the session was received in UTC in seconds. Populated only for traffic handled by Cisco Secure Firewall.

columns.name: LastPacketTimestamp
columns.description: The timestamp when the last packet of the session was received in UTC in seconds. Populated only for traffic handled by Cisco Secure Firewall.

columns.name: PacketsSent
columns.description: The number of packets sent during the session. Populated only for traffic handled by Cisco Secure Firewall.

columns.name: PacketsReceived
columns.description: The number of packets received during the session. Populated only for traffic handled by Cisco Secure Firewall.

columns.name: BytesSent
columns.description: The number of bytes sent during the session. Populated only for traffic handled by Cisco Secure Firewall.

columns.name: BytesReceived
columns.description: The number of bytes received during the session. Populated only for traffic handled by Cisco Secure Firewall.

columns.name: FwEventId
columns.description: The ID of the firewall event. Populated only for traffic handled by Cisco Secure Firewall.

columns.name: DestinationCountry
columns.description: The ISO-3166 alpha-2 two-character identifier of the country associated with the destination IP.

columns.name: AwsRegion
columns.description: The AWS region that stores your VPN logs.

columns.name: AppId
columns.description: The unique application ID identified for the current session.

columns.name: PrivateAppGroupId
columns.description: The unique ID of the private resource group ID that the private resource belongs to.

columns.name: PrivateFlow
columns.description: TRUE if Secure Access applied a private access rule to the user-generated traffic, and FALSE if Secure Access applied an internet access rule.

columns.name: PostureId
columns.description: The unique ID of the endpoint posture profile.

columns.name: CasiCategoryIds
columns.description: Name of the Application category to which the App ID belongs.

columns.name: TrafficSource
columns.description: The source of the user-generated traffic. Valid values are 0 - Unknown, 1 - VPN,2 – ZTNA, 3 - Network Tunnel.

columns.name: ContentCategoryIds
columns.description: ID of one or more content categories matched by the rule.

columns.name: ContentCategoryListIds
columns.description: ID of one or more content category lists that include categories matched by the rule.

columns.name: OrganizationId
columns.description: The Secure Access organization ID.

columns.name: EgressIp
columns.description: The public IP address assigned to a session as it exits the Secure Access ZTA infrastructure en route to the destination application.

columns.name: Egress
columns.description: TRUE indicates that the egress IP was a reserved IP.

columns.name: EventCorrelationId
columns.description: A unique identifier generated for each network request, the Event Correlation ID stitches together all related events across various security services (Firewall, SWG, ZTNA) to provide a unified, end-to-end view of a single traffic flow.
